mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL SET transfer_amount = #{amount}, transfer_day = #{transferDay}, target_account_number = #{targetAccountNumber}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE auto_transfer_id = #{autoTransferId}
mapper.select: SELECT auto_transfer_id AS id, dat_id AS datId, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, transfer_amount AS transferAmount, transfer_day AS transferDay, transfer_status AS transferStatus, created_at, updated_at FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE dat_id IN ( SELECT dat_id FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} )

SELECT auto_transfer_id AS id, dat_id AS datId, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, transfer_amount AS transferAmount, transfer_day AS transferDay, transfer_status AS transferStatus, created_at, updated_at FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE transfer_day = #{today} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
